# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| `main`  | Yes       |
| Older snapshots | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

- Do not open public issues for security reports.
- Use GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting if it is enabled for this repository.
- If private reporting is unavailable, contact the maintainer through a trusted private channel first.
- Include affected routes or files, impact, reproduction steps, and any known workaround.

## Response expectations

- Reports should be acknowledged within 7 days.
- Fix timelines depend on severity and available maintainer time.
- Please keep details private until a fix or coordinated disclosure plan is ready.
